tools.name: check_pgvector
tools.description: Verifies PGVector is running, checks the vector_store table exists, and returns row count. Use this before any ingestion or retrieval debugging.
tools.command: docker exec pgvector psql -U rag -d ragdb -c "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_chunks, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size('vector_store')) AS table_size FROM vector_store;" && docker exec pgvector psql -U rag -d ragdb -c "SELECT indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename = 'vector_store';"

tools.name: query_vectors
tools.description: Runs a raw cosine similarity search against PGVector for debugging retrieval. Pass a pre-computed embedding array as JSON and a top-k count to see what chunks would be returned and their similarity scores.
tools.command: docker exec pgvector psql -U rag -d ragdb -c "SELECT id, content, metadata, 1 - (embedding <=> '${embedding}'::vector) AS similarity FROM vector_store ORDER BY embedding <=> '${embedding}'::vector LIMIT ${top_k};"

embedding.description: JSON array of floats representing the query embedding, e.g. [0.123, -0.456, ...]

top_k.description: Number of nearest neighbours to return (default 5)

tools.name: get_embedding_model_info
tools.description: Returns the configured embedding model name, vector dimensions, and distance type by reading the resolved Spring application config. Confirms what model is actually wired — useful after config changes.
